layout.grid-template-areas:
"hero hero hero hero load load load load room room room room"
              "hrvTile hrvTile heartTile heartTile orb orb orb orb hrvChart hrvChart hrvChart hrvChart"
              "restingTile restingTile oxygenTile oxygenTile orb orb orb orb hrvChart hrvChart hrvChart hrvChart"
              "sleepTile sleepTile sleepTile sleepTile signal signal signal signal log log log log"

(max-width: 1100px).grid-template-areas:
"hero hero hero hero hero hero"
                  "load load load room room room"
                  "hrvTile hrvTile heartTile heartTile restingTile restingTile"
                  "oxygenTile oxygenTile sleepTile sleepTile sleepTile sleepTile"
                  "orb orb orb hrvChart hrvChart hrvChart"
                  "signal signal signal log log log"

card: background: radial-gradient(circle at 88% 38%, rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.42), rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.08) 24%, transparent 45%), linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(24,24,22,.98), rgba(7,7,8,.99))

card_mod.style: ha-card { background: radial-gradient(circle at 96% 10%, rgba(249,115,22,.22), transparent 32%), linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(20,20,18,.98), rgba(6,6,7,.99)) !important; text-align: left !important; } .hero { position: relative; z-index: 1; text-align: left; } .hero::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -52px -42px auto auto; width: 280px; height: 280px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.22), transparent 68%); filter: blur(18px); z-index: -1; } .topline { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 9px; align-items: center; color: rgba(242,233,220,.62); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 720; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; } .sun-dot { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; color: #fff7ed; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fb923c, #ea580c); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(249,115,22,.46); font-weight: 800; } .title { color: #fffaf2; font-size: 40px; font-weight: 780; line-height: 1.02; margin-top: 20px; letter-spacing: 0; } .subtitle { color: var(--accent); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 760; margin-top: 8px; } .reason { color: rgba(242,233,220,.74); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.38; max-width: 620px; margin-top: 15px; white-space: normal; overflow: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; } .pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 9px; margin-top: 18px; } .pills span { color: rgba(255,250,242,.84); background: rgba(255,255,255,.055); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 11px; font-size: 12px; } .pills b { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 760; } .pills .manual { color: #140a02; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fb923c, #ea580c); border-color: transparent; font-weight: 760; }

:host { display: block; height: calc(100% - 14px); margin: 7px; box-sizing: border-box; } ha-card { height: 100%; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(22,22,20,.98), rgba(7,7,8,.99)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.08), 0 18px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.58); overflow: hidden; } ha-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 1px; border-radius: 21px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.035); pointer-events: none; }

card.background: radial-gradient(circle at 88% 12%, rgba(249,115,22,.24), transparent 38%), linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(20,20,18,.98), rgba(6,6,7,.99))

card_mod.style: :host { display: block; height: calc(100% - 14px); margin: 7px; box-sizing: border-box; } ha-card { height: 100%; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(22,22,20,.96), rgba(8,8,9,.99)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.075), 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.44); overflow: hidden; } ha-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 1px; border-radius: 17px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03); pointer-events: none; }

card.background: radial-gradient(circle at 85% 12%, rgba(243,139,168,.16), transparent 38%), linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(20,20,18,.98), rgba(6,6,7,.99))

card_mod.style: :host { display: block; height: calc(100% - 14px); margin: 7px; box-sizing: border-box; } ha-card { height: 100%; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(22,22,20,.96), rgba(8,8,9,.99)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.075), 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.44); overflow: hidden; } ha-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 1px; border-radius: 17px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03); pointer-events: none; }

:host { display: block; height: calc(100% - 14px); margin: 7px; box-sizing: border-box; } ha-card { height: 100%; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(22,22,20,.96), rgba(8,8,9,.99)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.075), 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.44); overflow: hidden; } ha-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 1px; border-radius: 17px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03); pointer-events: none; }

:host { display: block; height: calc(100% - 14px); margin: 7px; box-sizing: border-box; } ha-card { height: 100%; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(22,22,20,.96), rgba(8,8,9,.99)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.075), 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.44); overflow: hidden; } ha-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 1px; border-radius: 17px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03); pointer-events: none; }

card.background: radial-gradient(circle at 68% 48%, rgba(249,115,22,.22), transparent 48%), linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(20,20,18,.98), rgba(6,6,7,.99))

card_mod.style: :host { display: block; height: calc(100% - 14px); margin: 7px; box-sizing: border-box; } ha-card { height: 100%; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(22,22,20,.98), rgba(7,7,8,.99)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.08), 0 18px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.58); overflow: hidden; } ha-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 1px; border-radius: 21px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.035); pointer-events: none; }

ha-card { background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(20,20,18,.98), rgba(6,6,7,.99)) !important; text-align: left !important; } .signal-card { width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 20px; box-sizing: border-box; color: #fffaf2; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; text-align: left; } .kicker { color: rgba(242,233,220,.56); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .16em; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 760; } .big { color: #fb923c; font-size: 42px; font-weight: 820; line-height: .95; margin-top: 7px; } .caption { color: rgba(242,233,220,.72); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.25; margin-top: 7px; } .formula { color: rgba(255,250,242,.84); background: rgba(255,255,255,.055); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 14px; padding: 8px 9px; margin-top: 10px; font-size: 11px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .signal-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 7px; margin-top: 10px; } .signal-grid span { background: rgba(255,255,255,.045); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); border-radius: 13px; padding: 8px 7px; min-width: 0; text-align: center; } .signal-grid b { display: block; color: #fffaf2; font-size: 14px; } .signal-grid small { display: block; color: rgba(242,233,220,.52); font-size: 9px; margin-top: 3px; white-space: nowrap; } .reason-line { color: rgba(242,233,220,.68); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.3; margin-top: 10px; white-space: normal; overflow: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; } .note { color: rgba(242,233,220,.46); font-size: 10px; margin-top: auto; padding-top: 8px; }

:host { display: block; height: calc(100% - 14px); margin: 7px; box-sizing: border-box; } ha-card { height: 100%; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(22,22,20,.98), rgba(7,7,8,.99)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.08), 0 18px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.58); overflow: hidden; } ha-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 1px; border-radius: 21px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.035); pointer-events: none; } ha-card { border-radius: 24px; }
